title: Track D: NOOS route receipt_writer_completion_evidence_repair wired to NF-MOTOR-RECEIPT-WRITER-REPAIR-001 with a registered machine owner
verdict: NONE — builder does not self-certify; author != verifier required for any PASS.
laws: FOUNDER_CANON v1 + governed-autorun v3. Violations = BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
founder_direction: Founder instruction in-session 2026-07-17: 'CHECK IT AND FINISH IT' following the offer to wire the registry's declared Track D next step.

recipe_conformance.diagnose_before: observer read path only — dual-signal classification via noos_observability_semantics_v1.classify_loop_state over noos_loop_registry (dispatch heartbeat) + noetfield_factory_cycle_runs (completion receipt)
recipe_conformance.repair: ONLY keyed idempotent retries of failed evidence-sink writes (read-before-write on run_id, L13); the sole writable table is the evidence sink noetfield_factory_cycle_runs (mutation_policy evidence_sink: full)
recipe_conformance.no_outbox_behavior: ESCALATE_FOUNDER_DECISION with the diagnosis attached — never re-dispatches loop execution, never improvises wider (recipe failure_policy: escalate)
recipe_conformance.verify_after: before/after external check pair via the observer read path; recovery PROVEN only when AFTER shows RUNNING_CONFIRMED — missing/stale AFTER stays UNPROVEN (correlation != causality)
recipe_conformance.receipts: every run writes a SUBMITTED receipt under receipts/ including forbidden_actions_not_taken
recipe_conformance.hard_walls_test_enforced: module contains no runner restart endpoint reference and no run_loop/run_factory dispatch calls — asserted by tests/test_noos_receipt_writer_repair_v1.py::test_module_has_no_execution_mutation_vocabulary

verification.new_tests: tests/test_noos_receipt_writer_repair_v1.py — 5 hermetic tests (route-gated intent, escalation without outbox, run_id idempotency incl. missing-key rejection, before/after pair proves only on fresh AFTER, no execution-mutation vocabulary)
verification.cli_fail_closed: python3 scripts/noos_receipt_writer_repair_v1.py run --loop-id demo (no creds) -> BLOCKED_WITH_REASON supabase_not_configured, exit 2
verification.registry_validator: python3 motor/registry/validate.py -> exit 0 (bindings file is registry metadata; recipes/jobs unchanged)

explicitly_not_done: scheduling the owner onto trigger hosts / the CF loop fleet — data/ trigger registries are verifier-frozen and worker deploys are founder-gated; the binding note discloses this
any restart, redeploy, or loop-execution change
any live Supabase write from this session (no credentials present; fail-closed verified)
